description: Ruby script that transitively calls ActionDispatch::Response#body through a Responder helper class, triggering CVE-2022-23633.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: app.rb calls Responder.build_response() which internally calls response.body

findings.human_justification: Responder#build_response calls ActionDispatch::Response#body transitively from the main script, making the vulnerability reachable through the helper class.
